# VR Racing Club

> Static GitHub Pages section for VR Racing Club on StarRiver Arts. Covers the community entry, Time Attack, and Events pages. The site is bilingual Traditional Chinese / English.

## Primary pages

- [Racing Club home](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/): community overview and section entry.
- [Events overview](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/): activity hub, calendar, series, and record links.
- [Event calendar](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/calendar.html): scheduled and finished activities.
- [Series](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/series.html): points-series schedules and standings.
- [Drivers](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/players.html): driver event records.
- [Vehicles](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/vehicles.html): vehicle activity records and duel stats.
- [Tracks](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/tracks.html): track activity results.
- [Teams](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/teams.html): team activity records.
- [Event detail shell](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/event.html): shared event detail page, usually used with a query string.
- [Time Attack](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/TimeAttack/): open record boards and lap-focused analysis.

## Machine-readable resources

- [Events summary JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/summary.json): overview metrics, recent results, upcoming events, and active series.
- [Events list JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/events.json): event calendar data with titles, dates, and links.
- [Matches JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/matches.json): per-match results grouped by event.
- [Results JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/results.json): per-result rows with player, vehicle, status, time, and points.
- [Driver stats JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/players_stats.json): driver summary records.
- [Vehicle stats JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/vehicles_stats.json): vehicle summary records.
- [Track stats JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/tracks_stats.json): track summary records.
- [Series JSON](https://starriverarts.github.io/StarRiver-Arts-Site/play/RacingClub/Events/data/series.json): series schedule and standings.

## Notes

- Event, driver, vehicle, team, and track detail pages currently use shared HTML shells and load the final content from JSON at runtime.
- Social previews currently expose page-level titles and a shared site image rather than per-entity thumbnails.
- If entity-specific search previews are needed later, the next step is static detail-shell generation per entity.
